title: Bump golang.org/x/crypto to the latest
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Bump  golang.org/x/crypto to the latest to avoid a low probability CVE.  The code involving the CVE is not currently called by Skopeo.  Addresses: https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1910448
